documentation_gates.notes: Closeout docs, tracked state, runtime, and PR evidence ownership are locked through the shared matrix.
Promotion checklist and tracked evidence ledger are now part of the workflow-v2 docs bundle.

operational_gates.notes: Manual handoff is now locked as an exception-only path for high-risk, anchor-extension, and exceptional recovery cases; provider waits use pause + scheduled resume.
Live smoke now has a required trigger matrix, canonical Actual Verification evidence source, and a recurring rehearsal cadence.
Scheduler standard now locks macOS launchd as the team-shared default, non-macOS fallback commands, and verify/watch cadence.

pilot_lanes.label: Authority-required UI lane
pilot_lanes.notes: slice06 authority-required pilot passed; audit bundle: .artifacts/meta-harness-auditor/slice06-stage6/report.md; authority evidence: ui/designs/authority/authority-report-06-recipe-to-planner.md; manual handoff: Stage 6 PR #120 merged

pilot_lanes.notes: slice06 source PR #120 Actual Verification reused by closeout preflight; closeout rehearsal PR #126 merged; declared external_smokes pnpm dev:local-supabase verified

pilot_lanes.notes: PR #129 fix/home-source-badge-labels merged; HOME source badge raw enum exposure fixed with targeted regression tests, refreshed HOME visual baselines, and promotion-gate audit bundle .artifacts/meta-harness-auditor/bugfix-patch-pr129/report.md.
